case_title: JESSICA INIGUEZ JAUREGUI VS. ROMULO ORTIZ

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ORTIZ, ROMULO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED JUL-08-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ORTIZ, ROMULO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-08-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-08-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF JESSICA INIGUEZ JAUEGUI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROMULO ORTIZ IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-08-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JAUREGUI, JESSICA INIGUEZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ORTIZ, ROMULO $3,525.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,615.00, REGARDING THE AGREED PAYMENT PLAN OF $100 A MONTH: THE FINAL PAYMENT OF $15 ON AUG-18-2022. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $100.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON AUG-18-2019 AND ON THE 18TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,701.76 FILED BY JAUREGUI, JESSICA INIGUEZ AS TO DEFENDANT ORTIZ, ROMULO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
